settings.heading: Confirm device and workflow fit
settings.copy: Confirm product fit by platform, device type, display path, and the setup you are building before setup begins.
settings.support_note: Compatibility is where purchase confidence and setup confidence meet. Use it to confirm the right fit before you buy, then move into manuals, downloads, or support only if you need the next layer of detail.

settings.heading: Compatibility guidance for real devices and workflows
settings.copy: Use compatibility guidance to buy with more confidence and reduce guesswork before setup begins.
settings.source_note: Check the device, platform, or workflow that matches your setup first. Move into manuals, downloads, or support only if the next step is still unclear.

settings.heading: Keep the next step close
settings.copy: Move from compatibility into setup files, guides, or direct support without starting over.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Continue to firmware, drivers, or utilities tied to supported products.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Continue to setup guides or documentation tied to supported products.

settings.title: Contact support
settings.copy: Escalate when compatibility depends on a more specific deployment question.

settings.heading: Need the next step after fit is confirmed?
settings.copy: If compatibility is clear but setup still is not, move into manuals first, then escalate only when the install path still needs help.
